task.title: Ensure PostHog tracking is set up on docs, blog, and catalog pages

events.content: Use manual, allowlisted PostHog pageviews in the web app: Use manual, allowlisted PostHog pageviews in the web app

raw.question: Use manual, allowlisted PostHog pageviews in the web app
raw.chosen: Use manual, allowlisted PostHog pageviews in the web app
raw.reasoning: The web app has private invite-token routes, so blanket autocapture or automatic pageview tracking could leak sensitive URLs. Manual route-matched pageviews cover docs/blog/catalog while excluding invite paths.

retrospective.summary: Added PostHog pageview tracking for the public docs/blog/catalog-style web routes using NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY from GitHub Actions, with invite-token routes excluded and verification via tests plus next build.
